title: Sohag Raat
actors: Begum Para, Bharat Bhushan, Geeta Bali
plot: When Lajjo is at her deathbed, she summons her stepson, Rahu, so that he can look after her son, Beli. Rahu does attend her residence, just before her death, assists with the funeral and offers to take Beli with him and look after...
